privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/structure_req_project' and the document is 'documents/IMP.json'. The expected structure requires IMP-2, IMP-3, and IMP-4 to be nested as children under IMP-1 ('User Authentication'). IMP-6 must be nested as a child under IMP-5 ('Data Export'). In ReqView, this is visually represented by indenting the child requirements below their respective parents.
